name: synapse
author: Jenil
description: The only MCP server combining semantic code search, temporal knowledge graph, and persistent AI memory. 74 tools, zero cloud, pure SQLite. Alternative to Mem0, GitNexus, Graphiti.

scripts.quality: npm run check && npm run lint && npm run test:coverage && npm run quality:cycles && npm run quality:deps && npm run quality:package && npm run quality:audit
scripts.check: tsc --noEmit && node --check bin/_boot.cjs && node --check bin/_shared.js && node --check bin/synapse.cjs && node --check bin/synapse-mcp.cjs && node --check bin/synapse-mcp-setup.cjs && node --check bin/synapse-mcp-doctor.cjs && node --check bin/synapse-mcp-upgrade.cjs && node --check bin/synapse-mcp-install-skill.cjs && node --check bin/synapse-mcp-task-context.cjs && node --check bin/synapse-mcp-capture-outcome.cjs && node --check bin/synapse.js && node --check bin/synapse-mcp.js && node --check bin/synapse-mcp-upgrade.js && node --check bin/synapse-mcp-setup.js && node --check bin/synapse-mcp-doctor.js && node --check bin/synapse-mcp-install-skill.js && node --check bin/synapse-mcp-task-context.js && node --check bin/synapse-mcp-capture-outcome.js && node --check scripts/runtime/setup-synapse.mjs && node --check scripts/runtime/upgrade-synapse.mjs && node --check scripts/runtime/doctor-synapse.mjs && node --check scripts/runtime/install-synapse-skill.mjs && node --check scripts/memory/task-context-synapse.mjs && node --check scripts/memory/capture-outcome-synapse.mjs && node --check scripts/memory/memory-workflow-cli-utils.mjs && node --check scripts/quality/quality-audit.mjs && node --check scripts/quality/quality-package.mjs && node --check scripts/quality/stress-synapse.mjs && node --check scripts/release/release-test-installed-runtime.mjs && node --check scripts/release/release-exit-criteria.mjs
